title: uragoga costivenia
side_effects: Uragoga costivenia can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high content of alkaloids. If ingested in large quantities, it can also lead to stomach ulcers and vomiting. Additionally, prolonged use or misuse of the plant can result in kidney damage and increased blood pressure. In severe cases, improper use of uragoga costivenia can even cause seizures and respiratory failure.
